# Bitbucket Server CLI

> `bb` is a Go CLI for automating Bitbucket Server and Data Center workflows. It covers pull requests, build status, branches, tags, commits, repository search, and code insights. It also ships a built-in MCP server and an AI skill for use in agentic workflows.

`bb` is positioned as the `gh`-style CLI for Bitbucket Server/Data Center teams. Use it to query and mutate Bitbucket resources from the command line or from AI agents.

Important notes:

- Only supports Bitbucket **Server** and **Data Center** — not Bitbucket Cloud.
- Agents cannot complete OAuth flows; use a Personal Access Token (PAT).
- All commands support `--json` for machine-readable output.
- Run `bb ai skill show` to print a version-accurate agent skill for the installed binary.

## Docs

- [Installation and Quickstart](https://vriesdemichael.github.io/bitbucket-server-cli/installation-and-quickstart/): Download, verify, install, and authenticate in under five minutes
- [Basic Usage](https://vriesdemichael.github.io/bitbucket-server-cli/basic-usage/): Common command patterns for PRs, branches, builds, and repos
- [Command Reference](https://vriesdemichael.github.io/bitbucket-server-cli/reference/commands/): Full auto-generated reference for every subcommand and flag
- [JSON Schemas](https://vriesdemichael.github.io/bitbucket-server-cli/reference/schemas/): Output and input JSON schemas for programmatic use

## AI Integration

- [Machine Mode and Diagnostics](https://vriesdemichael.github.io/bitbucket-server-cli/advanced/machine-mode-diagnostics/): JSON output contract and supportability patterns for AI agents
- [bb AI skill (SKILL.md)](https://github.com/vriesdemichael/bitbucket-server-cli/blob/main/skills/bb/SKILL.md): Complete agent skill covering all workflows, MCP tools, and authentication

## Optional

- [Advanced Topics](https://vriesdemichael.github.io/bitbucket-server-cli/advanced/): Bulk operations, dry-run planning, repository discovery, and server switching
- [ADR Records](https://vriesdemichael.github.io/bitbucket-server-cli/adr/): Architecture Decision Records explaining design choices
- [Changelog](https://vriesdemichael.github.io/bitbucket-server-cli/changelog/): Release history
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/vriesdemichael/bitbucket-server-cli): Source code, issues, and releases
